# Sample run output - DES / TripleDES lab

## Mode 1: DES Encrypt (single block)

Input:
  Mode: 1
  Plaintext: 0001001000110100010101100111100010011010101111001101111011110001
  Key:       0001001100110100010101110111100110011011101111001101111111110001

Output:
  Round key 1:  000110110000001011101111111111000111000001110010
  Round key 2:  011110011010111011011001110110111100100111100101
  Round key 3:  010101011111110010001010010000101100111110011001
  Round key 4:  011100101010110111010110110110110011010100011101
  Round key 5:  011111001110110000000111111001110001001000010001
  Round key 6:  011000111010010100111110101001111100011111100001
  Round key 7:  111011001000010010110111111101100001100010111100
  Round key 8:  111101111000101000111010110000010011101111111011
  Round key 9:  111000001101101111101011111011011110011110000001
  Round key 10: 101100011111001101000111101110100100011001001111
  Round key 11: 001000010101111111010011110111101101001110000110
  Round key 12: 011101010111000111110101100101000110011111101001
  Round key 13: 100101111100010111010001111110101011101001000001
  Round key 14: 010111110100001110110111111100101110011100111010
  Round key 15: 101111111001000110001101001111010011111100001010
  Round key 16: 110010110011110110001011000011100001011111110101
  Ciphertext: 0111111010111111010001001001001100100011111110101111101011111000

## Mode 2: DES Decrypt (round-trip verification)

Input:
  Mode: 2
  Ciphertext: 0111111010111111010001001001001100100011111110101111101011111000
  Key:        0001001100110100010101110111100110011011101111001101111111110001

Output:
  Plaintext: 0001001000110100010101100111100010011010101111001101111011110001
  [PASS] decrypt(encrypt(P)) == P

## Mode 1: DES Encrypt (multi-block, 78-bit plaintext with zero padding)

Input:
  Mode: 1
  Plaintext: 00010010001101000101011001111000100110101011110011011110111100011010101010101010
  Key:       0001001100110100010101110111100110011011101111001101111111110001

  Block 1 (bits 0-63):  0001001000110100010101100111100010011010101111001101111011110001
  Block 2 (bits 64-77 + 50 zero-pad): 1010101010101000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000

Output:
  Ciphertext: 01111110101111110100010010010011001000111111101011111010111110000100000010010001101001000010011111010110110001100000111000110100

## Mode 3: TripleDES Encrypt EDE

Input:
  Mode: 3
  Plaintext: 0001001000110100010101100111100010011010101111001101111011110001
  K1: 0001001100110100010101110111100110011011101111001101111111110001
  K2: 1111000011001100101010101111010101010110011001111000111100001111
  K3: 0000111100001111000011110000111100001111000011110000111100001111

  Step 1 - E(K1, P):  intermediate_1
  Step 2 - D(K2, step1): intermediate_2
  Step 3 - E(K3, step2): final ciphertext

Output:
  TripleDES Ciphertext: 0000100111010100110001011011100101000001100001100000010111111010

## Mode 4: TripleDES Decrypt

Input:
  Mode: 4
  Ciphertext: 0000100111010100110001011011100101000001100001100000010111111010
  K1, K2, K3: same as above

Output:
  TripleDES Plaintext: 0001001000110100010101100111100010011010101111001101111011110001
  [PASS] TripleDES decrypt(encrypt(P)) == P

## Negative test: wrong key

Input:
  Mode: 2
  Ciphertext: 0111111010111111010001001001001100100011111110101111101011111000
  WRONG Key:  1111000011001100101010101111010101010110011001111000111100001111

Output:
  Plaintext: (garbled - not equal to original plaintext)
  [PASS] Wrong key does not recover original plaintext

## Negative test: tamper (flip 1 bit in ciphertext)

Input:
  Mode: 2
  Ciphertext (bit 0 flipped): 1111111010111111010001001001001100100011111110101111101011111000
  Correct Key: 0001001100110100010101110111100110011011101111001101111111110001

Output:
  Plaintext: (garbled - avalanche effect: ~50% bits differ)
  [PASS] Tampered ciphertext does not decrypt to original plaintext
